metadata.description: Personal Claude Code marketplace by STiFLeR7 — memex (persistent agent memory via temporal knowledge graph) and prompt-forge (multi-perspective prompt refinement).

plugins.name: memex-mcp
plugins.description: Persistent memory for AI coding agents. Builds a temporal knowledge graph of your codebase and serves it to any MCP-compatible agent — every session starts knowing your architecture, decisions, and open problems.

plugins.name: prompt-forge
plugins.description: Advanced prompt refinement skill — extracts your real intent, investigates your codebase, and applies 9 perspective lenses (Security, QA, UX, Performance, …) before producing a grounded prompt for your execution tool.
